content.text: I dreamed of a door made of starlight. When I touched it, my hand became transparent.
content.raw_input: I dreamed of a door made of starlight. When I touched it, my hand became transparent.

content.text: A symbol appeared: three circles interlocking, rotating slowly. It felt like a warning and an invitation.
content.raw_input: A symbol appeared: three circles interlocking, rotating slowly. It felt like a warning and an invitation.
